steps.title: Find the x-coefficient
steps.content: The $x$-terms are $$20x-357x=-337x$$ so in $ax^2+bx+c$, the value of $b$ is $-337$.

steps.title: Ignore terms that do not affect b
steps.content: The value of $b$ is only the coefficient of the $x$ term. The $4x\cdot 17x$ product affects $a$, and the $-21\cdot 5$ product affects $c$, so the middle products decide $b$.
